data.title: Apogee Enterprises Announces Date for Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
data.description: In Minneapolis, Apogee Enterprises, Inc., a top provider of architectural building products, high-performance coated materials, and services, disclosed that they will reveal their fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full year results on Friday, April 24, 2026, prior to market opening. Additionally, they will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. Central Time on the same day. The company trades on Nasdaq under the symbol APOG. To join the live webcast, visit the provided link.

data.title: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Announces Changes to Board of Directors
data.description: In a recent development in the biopharmaceutical industry, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: RYTM) based in Boston disclosed changes to its Board of Directors. Kim Popovits has been named the new Director, taking over responsibilities from Ed Mathers, who is set to exit the company. Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is an established global biopharmaceutical firm that specializes in rare neuroendocrine diseases, with a strong focus on improving the quality of life for patients. This alteration in leadership signifies a strategic move for the company as it continues its mission to address the needs of individuals facing such medical conditions.

data.title: US Adds 178,000 Jobs In Sharp Rebound After February Shock
data.description: In March, the U.S. labor market rebounded significantly by adding 178,000 jobs, surpassing the anticipated 60,000 and reversing the previous month’s sharp decline of 133,000. This suggests that the prior weakness might have been an anomaly rather than a trend, at least for the time being. The unemployment rate remained stable at 4.3%, matching expectations, while wage growth was more moderate, increasing by 0.2% monthly and 3.5% annually, indicating a decrease in inflationary pressures. The data, sourced from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, depicts a recovery that is not evenly spread across all sectors. Health care saw the most significant increase, adding 76,000 jobs, contributing to the overall positive employment figures. For further details, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hopper Launches SUPPLYSHIELD™: A Secure Open Source Supply Layer Delivering Zero-CVE, Malware-Free Components Through a Trusted Registry
data.description: Hopper unveiled SUPPLYSHIELD™ on April 3, 2026, a cutting-edge software solution to facilitate secure consumption of open source materials by organizations. This new supply layer ensures components are provided from a constantly updated and safeguarded registry, guaranteeing zero identified vulnerabilities. Through SUPPLYSHIELD™, businesses can access and use open source products without any known security risks.

data.title: Shift of crypto supervision to ESMA, causing tension with Malta. MiCA balances EU and national control over providers.
data.description: The relocation of oversight for significant crypto asset service providers to the France-based ESMA is challenging MiCA's equilibrium between centralized EU regulation and decentralized national decision-making.
